consequences.description: The nightcap source has been relocated upstream. Old evidence trails go cold.
Nightcap root samples are found hidden in Elara's cottage by a 'concerned villager.' The poisoner is framing the healer.
Elara's cottage is broken into during the night. Her research notes on the poison are stolen. Someone is covering their tracks.
The poisoner abandons the water supply and begins contaminating food stores directly. The method has changed — nightcap in the flour, not the well.
